title: Identify the value of US coins and dollars
description: Practice identifying the value of US coins and dollars.
topic_path: Identify the value of US coins and dollars

assessment_items.question_content:
A coin is shown below.

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bf3d4317247a03d5ea6952a6b540be10.png)

**What is the value of the coin?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Every coin has a different value.

Coin name | Picture | Value
- | - | -
Penny | ![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/24a808a93af4ed0e41c0f91f1e6363a1.png) | $1¢$
Nickel | ![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7496abd286a40950c727cd3101bf69e3.png) | $5¢$
Dime | ![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a3001b1dd58a9ce0b6988eab2b017a1b.png) | $10¢$
Quarter | ![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a97d44fdd6885b91fd978a6f343bf488.png) | $25¢$

Which coin matches the image?
The coin is a nickel.
A nickel has a value of $5¢$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which coin is worth $25¢$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Every coin has a different value.

Coin name | Picture | Value
- | - | -
Penny | ![Front and back photo of penny.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/24a808a93af4ed0e41c0f91f1e6363a1.png) | $1¢$
Nickel | ![Front and back photo of nickel.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7496abd286a40950c727cd3101bf69e3.png) | $5¢$
Dime | ![Front and back photo of dime.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a3001b1dd58a9ce0b6988eab2b017a1b.png) | $10¢$
Quarter | ![Front and back photo of quarter.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a97d44fdd6885b91fd978a6f343bf488.png) | $25¢$

Which coin is worth $25¢$?
The quarter is worth $25¢$.

This image shows a quarter:

![1, quarter.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b89940de972ce363912c0b90999e9cf9.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which bill is worth $\$20$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Every bill has a different value.

Dollar name | Picture | Value
- | - | -
One dollar bill | ![A picture of the front and back of a one dollar bill.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8cf614d8a30f58b9d99c3f482b9c8d11.png) | $\$1$
Five dollar bill | ![A picture of the front and back of a five dollar bill.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/509d4d695254f232bbdf6db085ee1249.png) | $\$5$
Ten dollar bill | ![A picture of the front and back of a ten dollar bill.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5b1225b8c5541ce5887aa333be1b46a2.png) | $\$10$
Twenty dollar bill | ![A picture of the front and back of a twenty dollar bill.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/76bff9f86d9f6570bd8e5b00326a42ba.png) | $\$20$

Which bill is worth $\$20$?
The twenty dollar bill is worth $\$20$.

This bill is worth $\$20$:

![A twenty dollar bill.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/293d7b94441affe2ee5c945b7fd6d427.png)
